# analyze-stock-kpi

> Library-based stock KPI CLI: per-ticker fundamentals via yfinance plus a daily CNN Fear & Greed sentiment snapshot. No API keys, no scraping.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/README.md)
- [AGENTS](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
- [Architecture](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/docs/architecture.md)
- [User story](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/docs/UserStory.md)
- [Roadmap](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/docs/roadmap.md)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)

## Decisions (ADRs)

- [ADR-0000: Remove Traderfox](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/docs/decisions/0000-remove-traderfox.md)
- [ADR-0001: Defer financetoolkit](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/docs/decisions/0001-defer-financetoolkit.md)
- [ADR-0002: Simplified composites](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/docs/decisions/0002-simplified-composites.md)
- [ADR-0003: Defer RS hedging epic](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/docs/decisions/0003-defer-rs-hedging-epic.md)
- [ADR-0004: Price-history composite input](https://github.com/qte77/analyze-stock-kpi/blob/main/docs/decisions/0004-price-history-composite-input.md)
